## What changed

Describe the user-visible outcome and why it is needed.

## Verification

List the exact checks you ran.

- [ ] Regression tests pass
- [ ] Docker/Quarto render checked when rendering behavior changed
- [ ] New format behavior has a redistributable fixture
- [ ] Documentation and evidence tier are accurate
- [ ] No credentials, private papers, generated output, or proprietary data added

## Screenshots or samples

Include only when they materially help review and are safe to publish.
